name: signup-form-api
description: Express + DynamoDB backend for the SignUp form demo.

scripts.dev: DYNAMODB_ENDPOINT=http://localhost:8000 AWS_REGION=us-east-1 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=local AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=local node server.js
scripts.create-table: DYNAMODB_ENDPOINT=http://localhost:8000 AWS_REGION=us-east-1 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=local AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=local node create-table.js
